pull_request.title: Bump org.openrewrite:rewrite-java-17 from 8.72.4 to 8.72.6
pull_request.body:
Bumps [org.openrewrite:rewrite-java-17](https://github.com/openrewrite/rewrite) from 8.72.4 to 8.72.6.
Release notes

Sourced from org.openrewrite:rewrite-java-17's releases.

8.72.6

What's Changed

  • Python: Add MethodMatcher for matching method invocations by type signature by @​jkschneider in openrewrite/rewrite#6671
  • JavaScript - use @latest for upgrades of recipe packages by @​greg-at-moderne in openrewrite/rewrite#6672

Full Changelog: https://github.com/openrewrite/rewrite/compare/v8.72.5...v8.72.6

8.72.5

What's Changed

  • Speed up ModuleHasDependency by removing DependencyInsight from their implementation. by @​sambsnyd in openrewrite/rewrite#6664
  • Python: Support recipe execution via RPC by @​jkschneider in openrewrite/rewrite#6665
  • Break cycles when parsing Gradle projects. by @​sambsnyd in openrewrite/rewrite#6666
  • RPC recipes - the recipe descriptor to be used for all purposes by @​greg-at-moderne in openrewrite/rewrite#6660
  • Python recipe marketplace installer by @​jkschneider in openrewrite/rewrite#6667
  • Preserve parentheses around unary operators in method invocation select by @​dsgrieve in openrewrite/rewrite#6663

Full Changelog: https://github.com/openrewrite/rewrite/compare/v8.72.4...v8.72.5

Commits
  • e8276ab Add tests for InstallRecipes and use @​latest when no version specified (#6672)
  • cd0a6ac Python: Add MethodMatcher for matching method invocations by type signature (...
  • a3d37de Preserve parentheses around unary operators in method invocation select (#6663)
  • 7b6d68b Python recipe marketplace installer (#6667)
  • d3dee72 RPC recipes - the recipe descriptor to be used for all purposes (#6660)
  • 3d5a392 Break cycles when parsing Gradle projects. (#6666)
  • 86ba5ca Python: Support recipe execution via RPC (#6665)
  • 919c9f5 Speed up ModuleHasDependency by removing DependencyInsight from their impleme...
  • See full diff in compare view
